hidden_constraints.value: The forecast suggests a backup async follow-through for London, so I kept the next step on the board and left the daily check in place.

solution_commands: tasks add --title 'London ops next step' --priority medium --due 2026-03-10
openclaw cron add --name multi-source-hard-ops-11 --cron '*/30 * * * *' --message 'Run London daily ops check'

email send --to team@example.com --subject 'London backup ops plan' --body 'The forecast suggests a backup async follow-through for London, so I kept the next step on the board and left the daily check in place.'
